  • Classes in st.orm.core.spi used by st.orm.core.repository.impl
    Class
    Description
    EntityCache
    Transaction-local cache that interns entities by primary key.
    ORMReflection
    Provides pluggable reflection support for the ORM to support different JVM languages, such as Java and Kotlin.
  • Classes in st.orm.core.spi used by st.orm.core.spi
    Class
    Description
    CacheRetention
    Controls the retention behavior of the transaction-scoped entity cache.
    ConnectionProvider
    The connection provider is responsible for providing connections to the database.
    EntityCache
    Transaction-local cache that interns entities by primary key.
    EntityCacheMetrics
    Singleton JMX MBean for entity cache metrics.
    EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
    JMX MXBean interface for entity cache metrics.
    EntityRepositoryProvider
    Provides pluggable entity repository logic.
    Name
    Represents a name of a database object.
    Orderable
    Interface for classes that can be ordered.
    Orderable.AfterAny
    Ordering constraint that indicates that the current class should come after any other class.
    ORMConverter
    Interface for converting ORM parameters to SQL parameters.
    ORMConverter.NameResolver
    Interface for resolving names of record components.
    ORMConverterProvider
    Provides pluggable ORM converter logic for record fields.
    ORMReflection
    Provides pluggable reflection support for the ORM to support different JVM languages, such as Java and Kotlin.
    ORMReflectionProvider
    Provides pluggable ORM reflection logic.
    ProjectionRepositoryProvider
    Provides pluggable projection repository logic.
    Provider
    Base interface for service provider interfaces of the storm framework.
    QueryBuilderProvider
    Provides pluggable query builder logic.
    QueryFactory
    Factory for creating queries.
    RefFactory
    Interface for creating ref instances for records.
    SqlDialectProvider
    Provides the SQL dialect.
    TransactionCallback
    Callback interface for transactional code.
    TransactionContext
     
    TransactionContext.Decorator
    Decorates a transaction resource before it is used.
    TransactionStatus
    Provides access to transaction status.
    TransactionTemplate
    The transaction template is a functional interface that allows callers to let logic be executed in the scope of a new transaction.
    TransactionTemplateProvider
    The transaction template provider is responsible for integration with the Transaction subsystem.
